title: Quick question about 10
wikitext:
[]: Quick question about 1.0             Quote Post by chaosakita » Tue Nov 17, 2009 7:04 pm I already read about this before, but I couldn't find it, so I'll go just ask it again. Does anyone know who was the female talking during the scene where someone was asking Gendou what he would name his children? And why were they using the last name "Ayanami?"

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Tue Nov 17, 2009 7:07 pm The female Voice should be Shinjis Mother as i got it. Furthermore the mixture of Shinji and Rei plus Ayanami and Ikari is made too draw a conclusion of the special bond or relationship of those two. I don`t know how much you into evangelion so that is maybe a spoiler for you if i tell you whats all about that.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Nov 17, 2009 7:11 pm its yui untill she giggles, then it switches to Rei who has the same voice actress. It was confirmed by the script

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Wed Nov 18, 2009 12:42 pm ah okay so thats how it is
